equity.label: S&P 500 equity pressure
equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2026-03-09 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 41.03
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-03-09: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 41.03/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-03-09, the score printed 41.03/100 in the elevated regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
